name: Fungal Armor
description:
This +2 greater resilient Studded Leather Armor is made of hardened fungus. Every day the armor grows dozens of unusual mushrooms that can be used for cooking, infused reagents, or common spell material components.

Activate (Reaction) or (1 Action) Envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You are hit by a melee, ranged, or spell attack

Effect The attack misses you, dealing no damage as you transform into a cloud of spores. You gain the benefits of a Vapor Form spell for 1 minute.

For the duration, a cloud of deadly spores surrounds you. Each breathing creature that begins its turn within 10 feet of you takes 6d8 poison damage (DC 35 Fortitude check).

You can Dismiss the cloud form.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of Toxic Cloud and gaseous form.
